name_en: 【New】Gucci Blondie Mini Shoulder Bag The new Gucci Blondie bag features the brand's iconic series motif, which first appeared in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style to perfectly interpret classic design and modern essence. This mini shoulder bag is selected from glossy leather and comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap for crossbody wear. Black glossy leather, brown cotton-linen blend lining, circular interlocking double G, adjustable shoulder strap (47 to 57cm high); length adjustable between 110cm and 130cm, zip closure, weight: approx. 350g, fits o max/us, airds, long and lip models.

This mini shoulder bag is selected from glossy leather and comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap for crossbody wear. Black glossy leather, brown cotton-linen blend lining, circular interlocking double G, adjustable shoulder strap (47 to 57cm high); length adjustable between 110cm and 130cm, zip closure, weight: approx. 350g, fits o max/us, airds, long and lip models.
Model: 820429.
Dimensions: 21(W) x 15.5(H) x 8cm(D)
Color: Black full-grain leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
